summary.scope: Final US-844 completion gate including newly discovered rank-32000 task PERSONAL-TASK-1160 / MZ-408.
summary.conclusion: US-844 satisfies PERSONAL-REQ-1760, PERSONAL-REQ-1761, PERSONAL-AC-2426, and PERSONAL-AC-2427. Required task reports MZ-401 through MZ-408 are present and accepted, the prior MZ-406 visual blocker is closed by fix/rerun/attempt-2 evidence, MZ-407 component regression passed, and MZ-408 release gate passed with fresh npm run verify evidence. No dependent component or contract gap remains for this US.
summary.important_context: review-cycle-1 was used as supporting context only because it predated discovery of PERSONAL-TASK-1160 / MZ-408. This review-cycle-2 includes MZ-408 as required.

requirements_coverage.summary: The domain score model maintains bullet, mountain, and directed mutual whist values for all three players. Source inspection and accepted MZ-402/MZ-407/MZ-408 reports confirm score cloning, score deltas, whist antisymmetry, and UI exposure of the full score shape.

Deal settlement creates structured deal results with before/delta/after scores, whist adjustments, and target-reached state. Final settlement creates deterministic ranking/final result data and exposes it to the UI. Accepted integration, component regression, visual, accessibility, and release-gate reports corroborate this path.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.summary: US-scoped integration tests settle a deal and verify updated score totals plus mutual-whist deltas are reflected in rendered score/result UI. Accessibility and visual reports confirm the score/result display remains readable and labeled in desktop/laptop scope.

Integration and renderer tests verify bullet completion reaches finished state, finalResult winner/ranking is shown, and settle/next-deal continuation controls are absent. MZ-406 visual evidence and MZ-408 release gate both confirm final result readability and no accidental continuation.

component_coverage.summary: All US-844-owned layers have actual code, test, or evidence changes: QA design, scoring domain/state, settlement engine, persistence compatibility, score/result UI, US-scoped integration tests, accessibility review, desktop/laptop visual evidence, component regression, and release-gate verification.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Maintain a full preference score model: bullet, mountain, and mutual whists for all three players throughout the bullet.
live_paths: Domain unit tests and local static-app integration tests executed under npm run verify per MZ-408.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: Requirement coverage for score data model and settlement score dimensions.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No backend/live service evidence applies because the epic scope is a static Vite browser game with localStorage persistence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Settle each completed deal and final bullet, calculate deal/final results, and expose the result to the UI.
live_paths: Local engine-to-renderer integration tests for settlement, next-deal, and finished states.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: Requirement coverage for deal settlement, final settlement/ranking, and UI exposure.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Integration evidence is in-process browser/static-app evidence, not backend API evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given a deal completes, when the deal result is settled, the score table/result display updates bullet, mountain, and mutual whist values for all players.
live_paths: US-844 integration test settles a real engine state and renders the resulting next-deal score/result UI.
mocked_paths: output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs renders constructed active, settlement, and final frontend states for static visual screenshots.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: AC-2426 functional, accessibility, and desktop/laptop visual evidence.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Playwright screenshots are acceptable static visual UI evidence only; they are not overstated as backend/live evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given the bullet target is reached, when final settlement is calculated, final ranking/result is shown and continuation is prevented.
live_paths: Local integration test drives settleDeal to finished state and verifies finalResult winner/ranking plus absence of settleDeal/startNextDeal controls.
mocked_paths: output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs renders constructed final state for desktop/laptop visual review.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: AC-2427 final result and completed-bullet continuation guard.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Visual evidence is static frontend fixture evidence; no backend/live path exists for this static app.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Every evidence row must use acceptable evidence for a static browser app, and mocked/browser fixture evidence must not be overstated.
live_paths: npm run verify from MZ-408 is accepted as current local release readiness evidence.
mocked_paths: MZ-406 visual captures use constructed frontend states against local Vite and are accepted only for static UI visual/layout verification.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: Evidence classification and integrity of static-app verification.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No network/backend/live-user evidence is claimed or required.

evidence_matrix.scenario: No expanded statistics or visible full deal history were added beyond approved score/result/final-summary scope.
evidence_matrix.accepted_for: Approved US scope and release readiness.
evidence_matrix.limitations: The existing compact in-game log and technical persisted deal history remain in scope for current state/debugging; they are not a new visible full deal history surface.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Completion gate dependency completeness, including MZ-408.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: review-cycle-1 was reviewed only as supporting context.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Scoring scenario design and downstream verification traceability.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: QA design intentionally distinguished executable MVP behavior from provisional exact-DOS formula gaps; downstream tasks implemented the accepted MVP scoring contract.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: US-844 deal settlement and final completion scenarios.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Tests are local static-app integration tests, appropriate for this app scope.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Readable/labeled score, deal result, final result, keyboard-reachable controls where present, and no finished-state continuation controls.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Evidence is source/test/report based; no separate manual screen-reader session was recorded.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Desktop/laptop readability of ongoing score, deal settlement, and final result states; closure of the prior MZ-406 laptop clipping blocker.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Screenshots are static frontend fixture evidence. Full mobile is out of MVP scope.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Regression coverage across score model, settlement, result UI, final completion guard, no expanded stats/full visible history, accessibility, visual evidence, and release readiness.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: MZ-407 predated MZ-408 but is itself covered by MZ-408 release gate.

quality_gate_matrix.applicability: required and newly included in cycle-2
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Final release readiness after all dependency tasks, including MZ-407 and MZ-406 post-fix visual closure.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: MZ-408 classifies Playwright screenshots as synthetic/static visual UI evidence, which is acceptable for this static Vite/localStorage game.

quality_gate_matrix.evidence_source: task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1160/attempt-1.json records fresh npm run verify passing with 13 test files, 126 tests, tsc, and vite build.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No rerun was needed in this review because accepted MZ-408 evidence is fresh, current, and not contradicted.

quality_gate_matrix.applicability: not applicable beyond static localStorage persistence boundary
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: US-844 introduced no backend, auth, accounts, network API, payment, or sensitive-data boundary.

commands_relied_on_from_accepted_reports: npm run verify from task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1160/attempt-1.json: 13 test files, 126 tests, tsc, and vite build passed
MZ-406 orchestrator visual rerun: targeted UI/integration tests, local Vite capture, Playwright screenshot generation, and npm run verify passed
